stages.native:
select concat(m."First name", ' ', m."Last name") as name, p.category
from raw_members as m join membership_packages as p on m."Membership" = p.name and p.season = '2024'
where p.category <> 'Pavilion Key' and p.category <> 'Honorary' and p.category <> 'Social' and
      not exists  (
            select 1
            from raw_members as m2 join membership_packages as p2 on m2."Membership" = p2.name and p2.season = '2025'
            where concat(m2."First name", ' ', m2."Last name") = concat(m."First name", ' ', m."Last name")
                and p2.category <> 'Pavilion Key' and p2.category <> 'Honorary' and p2.category <> 'Social'
   ) ;

name: Count of Members Not Renewed - Selected Year

stages.native:
SELECT
  count(*)
FROM
  raw_members AS m
  JOIN membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name
  AND p.season = ((({{year}})::int) - 1)::text
WHERE
  p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND p.category <> 'Honorary'
  AND p.category <> 'Social'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT
      1
    FROM
      raw_members AS m2
      JOIN membership_packages AS p2 ON m2."Membership" = p2.name
      AND p2.season = {{year}}
    WHERE
      concat(m2."First name", ' ', m2."Last name") = concat(m."First name", ' ', m."Last name")
      AND p2.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
      AND p2.category <> 'Honorary'
      AND p2.category <> 'Social'
  )
;

SELECT
  count(*) AS count
FROM raw_members AS m
JOIN membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name
WHERE p.season = (({{year}})::int - 1)::text
  AND p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
;

SELECT
  count(*) AS count
FROM raw_members AS m
JOIN membership_packages AS p
  ON m."Membership" = p.name
WHERE p.season = ({{year}})::text
  AND p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  AND m."Status" = 'Active';

name: Count of Non-Active Members - Previous Year

stages.native:
SELECT
  count(*) AS count,
  ({{year}})::text AS year
FROM raw_members AS m
JOIN membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name
WHERE p.season = (({{year}})::int - 1)::text
  AND p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  AND m."Status" IS DISTINCT FROM 'Active'
;

name: Count of Non-Active Members - Selected Year

stages.native:
SELECT
  count(*) AS count,
  ({{year}})::text AS year
FROM raw_members AS m
JOIN membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name
WHERE p.season = ({{year}})::text
  AND p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  AND m."Status" IS DISTINCT FROM 'Active'
;

SELECT
  m."First name",
  m."Last name",
  m."Gender",
  m."Age",
  m."Email address",
  m."Phone number",
  m."Mobile number",
  m."Address 1",
  m."Address 2",
  m."Address 3",
  m."Town",
  m."County",
  m."Country",
  m."Postcode",
  p.category,
  u.id,
  u.postcode AS postcode_2,
  u.latitude,
  u.longitude
FROM public.raw_members m
LEFT JOIN public.membership_packages p
  ON m."Membership" = p.name
LEFT JOIN public.ukpostcodes u
  ON upper(
       substring(replace(coalesce(m."Postcode", ''), ' ', '') from 1 for greatest(length(replace(coalesce(m."Postcode", ''), ' ', '')) - 3, 0))
       || case when length(replace(coalesce(m."Postcode", ''), ' ', '')) > 3 then ' ' else '' end
       || right(replace(coalesce(m."Postcode", ''), ' ', ''), 3)
     ) = upper(
       substring(replace(coalesce(u.postcode, ''), ' ', '') from 1 for greatest(length(replace(coalesce(u.postcode, ''), ' ', '')) - 3, 0))
       || case when length(replace(coalesce(u.postcode, ''), ' ', '')) > 3 then ' ' else '' end
       || right(replace(coalesce(u.postcode, ''), ' ', ''), 3)
     )
WHERE m."Status" = 'Active'
  AND p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND p.season = {{year}}
ORDER BY m."Last name", m."First name"

stages.native:
select TO_CHAR (s.signup_date, 'dd-MM-yyyy hh:mm') as signup_date, s.member, s.payer, s.product as paid_product, m."First name" as "First name", m."Last name", m."Age", m."Email address" as email_address,
       m."Address 1" as address_1, m."Address 2" as address_2, m."Address 3" as address_3, m."Town" as "town", m."Postcode" as "postcode",
       'Y' as "Tags provided", '' as "Key pin number"
    from member_signups as s left join raw_members as m on s.member = concat(m."First name", ' ', m."Last name") and s.product = m."Membership",
        membership_packages as p
    where s.product = p.name and p.season = '2025'
      and concat(m."First name", ' ', m."Last name") = s.member
      order by s.signup_date;

select TO_CHAR (s.signup_date, 'dd-MM-yyyy hh:mm') as signup_date, s.member, s.payer, s.product as product, x."First name" as "First name", x."Last name", m."Age", m."Email address" as email_address,
       x."Address 1" as address_1, x."Address 2" as address_2, x."Address 3" as address_3, x."town" as "town", x."postcode" as "postcode",
       'Y' as "Tags provided", '' as "Key pin number"
    from member_signups as s 
	 	inner join raw_members as m on s.member = concat(m."First name", ' ', m."Last name") and m."Membership" = s.product,
	 	raw_contacts as x
    where s.signup_date > '2025-04-20 09:04' 
     and not (s."member" like '%Moore%')
     and s.payer = concat(x."First name", ' ', x."Last name")
      order by s.signup_date

select TO_CHAR (s.signup_date, 'dd-MM-yyyy hh:mm') as signup_date, s.member, s.payer, s.product as product, x."First name" as "First name", x."Last name", m."Age", m."Email address" as email_address,
       x."Address 1" as address_1, x."Address 2" as address_2, x."Address 3" as address_3, x."town" as "town", x."postcode" as "postcode",
       'Y' as "Tags provided", '' as "Key pin number"
    from member_signups as s 
	 	inner join raw_members as m on s.member = concat(m."First name", ' ', m."Last name") and m."Membership" = s.product,
	 	raw_contacts as x
     where s.payer = concat(x."First name", ' ', x."Last name")
      order by s.signup_date

select TO_CHAR (s.signup_date, 'dd-MM-yyyy hh:mm') as signup_date, s.member, s.payer, s.product as paid_product, m."First name" as "First name", m."Last name", m."Age", m."Email address" as email_address,
       m."Address 1" as address_1, m."Address 2" as address_2, m."Address 3" as address_3, m."Town" as "town", m."Postcode" as "postcode",
       'Y' as "Tags provided", '' as "Key pin number"
    from member_signups as s left join raw_members as m on s.member = concat(m."First name", ' ', m."Last name") and s.product = m."Membership",
        membership_packages as p
    where s.product = p.name and p.season = '2025'
      and concat(m."First name", ' ', m."Last name") = s.member
      order by s.signup_date;

name: List of Members Not Renewed - Selected Year

stages.native:
SELECT
  *
FROM
  raw_members AS m
  JOIN membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name
  AND p.season = ((({{year}})::int) - 1)::text
WHERE
  p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND p.category <> 'Honorary'
  AND p.category <> 'Social'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT
      1
    FROM
      raw_members AS m2
      JOIN membership_packages AS p2 ON m2."Membership" = p2.name
      AND p2.season = {{year}}
    WHERE
      concat(m2."First name", ' ', m2."Last name") = concat(m."First name", ' ', m."Last name")
      AND p2.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
      AND p2.category <> 'Honorary'
      AND p2.category <> 'Social'
  );

SELECT
  m."First name", m."Last name", p.Category, m."Junior"
FROM
  raw_members AS m
  JOIN membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name
  AND p.season = '2025'
WHERE
  p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND p.category <> 'Honorary'
  AND p.category <> 'Social'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT
      1

      JOIN membership_packages AS p2 ON m2."Membership" = p2.name

    WHERE
      concat(m2."First name", ' ', m2."Last name") = concat(m."First name", ' ', m."Last name")

      AND p2.category <> 'Social'
  );

description: Current raw_members snapshot plus archived yearly snapshots from vw_members_current_and_historical.
name: Members Current and Historical

stages.native: select snapshot_year, is_current, snapshot_recorded_at, snapshot_source, "First name", "Last name", "Membership", "Status", "Expiry Date", "Email address" from public.vw_members_current_and_historical order by snapshot_year desc, is_current desc, "Last name", "First name"

SELECT membership AS "Membership", "2025/2026", "2024/2025", "2023/2024", "2022/2023", "2021/2022", "2020/2021", "2019/2020", "2018/2019", "2017/2018", "2016/2017", "2015/2016", "2014/2015" FROM public.membership_history ORDER BY CASE WHEN membership = 'Total' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, membership;

SELECT membership AS "Membership", "2025/2026", "2024/2025", "2023/2024", "2022/2023", "2021/2022", "2020/2021", "2019/2020", "2018/2019", "2017/2018", "2016/2017", "2015/2016", "2014/2015" FROM public.membership_history ORDER BY CASE WHEN membership = 'Total' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, membership;

SELECT
  TO_CHAR(s.signup_date, 'dd-MM-yy hh:mm') AS signup_date,
  s.member,
  s.payer,
  TO_CHAR(y.charge_date, 'dd-MM-yy hh:mm') AS charge_date,
  y.product AS paid_product,
  y.provider,
  y.amount,
  y.quantity
FROM
  member_signups AS s
  LEFT JOIN raw_members AS m ON s.member = concat(m."First name", ' ', m."Last name")
  AND s.product = m."Membership"
  JOIN payments AS y ON s.payer = concat(y.first_name, ' ', y.last_name),
  membership_packages AS p
WHERE
  s.product = p.name
  AND p.season = '2025'
  AND s.signup_date > '2025-03-15 10:31:50'
ORDER BY
  s.signup_date;

description: Detail list for membership summary click-through.
name: Members in Category - Selected Year

stages.native:
SELECT
  concat(m."First name", ' ', m."Last name") AS member_name,
  p.category,
  m."Membership",
  m."Payment",
  m."Status",
  m."Email address",
  m."Phone number",
  m."Mobile number",
  m."Postcode"
FROM public.raw_members AS m
JOIN public.membership_packages AS p
  ON m."Membership" = p.name
WHERE p.season = {{year}}
  AND p.category = {{category}}
  AND m."Status" = 'Active'
  AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
ORDER BY m."Last name", m."First name";

name: Members Payments Breakdown (Excluding not paid) - Modified

stages.native:
SELECT
  p.category,
  p.display_order,
  count(*) AS Count
FROM raw_members AS m
JOIN membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name
WHERE p.season = (({{year}})::int - 1)::text
  AND p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
GROUP BY p.category, p.display_order
ORDER BY p.display_order;

SELECT p.category AS category, count(*) AS count FROM public.raw_members AS m JOIN public.membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name WHERE p.season = {{year}} AND p.category <> 'Pavilion Key' AND m."Status" = 'Active' AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid') GROUP BY p.category, p.display_order ORDER BY p.display_order;

SELECT
  signup_date,
  member,
  product,
  payer,
  cost,
  quantity,
  method,
  status,
  "Tags provided",
  id,
  clubspark_status,
  batch_id
FROM member_signups
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM signup_date) = ({{year}})::int
ORDER BY signup_date DESC
LIMIT 10;

name: n8n Executions by Workflow and Status

stages.native:
SELECT
  w.name AS workflow_name,
  e.status,
  count(*) AS execution_count,
  max(e."startedAt") AS latest_execution_at
FROM n8n.execution_entity e
LEFT JOIN n8n.workflow_entity w ON w.id = e."workflowId"
GROUP BY w.name, e.status
ORDER BY w.name, e.status;

SELECT
  e.id AS execution_id,
  w.name AS workflow_name,
  e.status,
  e.mode,
  e."startedAt" AS started_at,
  e."stoppedAt" AS stopped_at,
  round(extract(epoch from (coalesce(e."stoppedAt", now()) - e."startedAt"))::numeric, 1) AS duration_seconds
FROM n8n.execution_entity e
LEFT JOIN n8n.workflow_entity w ON w.id = e."workflowId"
ORDER BY e."startedAt" DESC
LIMIT 100;

select concat(m."First name", ' ', m."Last name") as name, p.category
from raw_members as m join membership_packages as p on m."Membership" = p.name and p.season = '2025'
where p.category <> 'Pavilion Key' and p.category <> 'Honorary' and p.category <> 'Social' and
      not exists  (
            select 1
            from raw_members as m2 join membership_packages as p2 on m2."Membership" = p2.name and p2.season = '2024'
            where concat(m2."First name", ' ', m2."Last name") = concat(m."First name", ' ', m."Last name")
                and p2.category <> 'Pavilion Key' and p2.category <> 'Honorary' and p2.category <> 'Social'
   ) ;

SELECT
  m."First name" AS "First name",
  m."Last name" AS "Last name",
  m."Membership" AS "Membership",
  p.category AS "Category",
  p.display_order AS "Display order",
  p.season AS "Season",
  m."Payment" AS "Payment",
  m."Status" AS "Status",
  m."Email address" AS "Email",
  m."Phone number" AS "Phone",
  m."Mobile number" AS "Mobile"
FROM raw_members AS m
JOIN membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name
WHERE p.season = (({{year}})::int - 1)::text
  AND p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  AND m."Status" IS DISTINCT FROM 'Active'
ORDER BY p.display_order, m."Last name", m."First name";

SELECT
  m."First name" AS "First name",
  m."Last name" AS "Last name",
  m."Membership" AS "Membership",
  p.category AS "Category",
  p.display_order AS "Display order",
  p.season AS "Season",
  m."Payment" AS "Payment",
  m."Status" AS "Status",
  m."Email address" AS "Email",
  m."Phone number" AS "Phone",
  m."Mobile number" AS "Mobile"
FROM raw_members AS m
JOIN membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name
WHERE p.season = ({{year}})::text
  AND p.category <> 'Pavilion Key'
  AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
  AND m."Status" IS DISTINCT FROM 'Active'
ORDER BY p.display_order, m."Last name", m."First name";

result_metadata.name: SUBTOTAL

result_metadata.description: This is the amount of local and federal taxes that are collected on the purchase. Note that other governmental fees on some products are not included here, but instead are accounted for in the subtotal.

collection.description: Some examples to get started with
collection.name: Examples

stages.native:
SELECT 
    s.signup_date,
    s.member,
    s.payer,
    s.product,
    b.status AS batch_status,
    x."Address 1", 
    x."Address 2", 
    x."town", 
    x."postcode",
    -- Create a simple 'True/False' column for the parent product
    CASE WHEN s.product = '6. Parent 2026' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_parent_2026,
    CASE WHEN s.product NOT IN ('6. Parent 2026', 'b. Pavilion Key', 'a. Social 2026') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_other_product,
    CASE WHEN s.product = 'b. Pavilion Key' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_key
FROM "public"."signup_batches" AS b
INNER JOIN "public"."member_signups" AS s ON b.id = s.batch_id
LEFT JOIN "public"."raw_contacts" AS x ON s.payer = CONCAT(x."First name", ' ', x."Last name")
WHERE b.status = 'Processing'

SELECT 
    s.signup_date,
    s.member,
    s.payer,
    s.product,
    b.status AS batch_status,
    x."Address 1", 
    x."Address 2", 
    x."town", 
    x."postcode",
    -- Create a simple 'True/False' column for the parent product
    CASE WHEN s.product = '6. Parent 2026' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_parent_2026,
    CASE WHEN s.product <> '6. Parent 2026' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_other_product
FROM "public"."signup_batches" AS b
INNER JOIN "public"."member_signups" AS s ON b.id = s.batch_id
LEFT JOIN "public"."raw_contacts" AS x ON s.payer = CONCAT(x."First name", ' ', x."Last name")
WHERE b.status = 'Processing'

SELECT 
    s.signup_date,
    s.member,
    s.payer,
    s.product,
    b.status AS batch_status,
    x."Address 1", 
    x."Address 2", 
    x."town", 
    x."postcode",
    -- Create a simple 'True/False' column for the parent product
    CASE WHEN s.product = '6. Parent 2026' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_parent_2026,
    
    -- Updated logic: Must not be Parent AND must not be Key AND must not be Social
    CASE 
        WHEN s.product <> '6. Parent 2026' 
         AND s.product <> 'b. Pavilion Key' 
         AND s.product <> 'a. Social 2026' 
        THEN 1 ELSE 0 
    END AS is_other_product,
    
    CASE WHEN s.product = 'b. Pavilion Key' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_key,
    CASE WHEN s.product = 'a. Social 2026' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS is_social

FROM "public"."signup_batches" AS b
INNER JOIN "public"."member_signups" AS s ON b.id = s.batch_id
LEFT JOIN "public"."raw_contacts" AS x ON s.payer = CONCAT(x."First name", ' ', x."Last name")
WHERE b.status = 'Processing'

stages.native:
SELECT
  b.id AS batch_id,
  b.status,
  b.created_at,
  b.completed_at,
  count(ms.id) AS member_row_count,
  count(*) FILTER (WHERE ms.status = 'Processing') AS in_progress_row_count
FROM signup_batches AS b
LEFT JOIN member_signups AS ms
  ON ms.batch_id = b.id
GROUP BY b.id, b.status, b.created_at, b.completed_at
ORDER BY b.id DESC;

SELECT signup_day, count(*) AS count
FROM (
  SELECT
    CASE EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM signup_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/London')::int
      WHEN 1 THEN 'Monday'
      WHEN 2 THEN 'Tuesday'
      WHEN 3 THEN 'Wednesday'
      WHEN 4 THEN 'Thursday'
      WHEN 5 THEN 'Friday'
      WHEN 6 THEN 'Saturday'
      WHEN 7 THEN 'Sunday'
    END AS signup_day,
    EXTRACT(ISODOW FROM signup_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/London')::int AS sort_order
  FROM public.member_signups
  WHERE signup_date IS NOT NULL
) t
GROUP BY signup_day, sort_order
ORDER BY sort_order

SELECT EXTRACT(HOUR FROM signup_date AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/London')::int AS signup_hour, count(*) AS count
FROM public.member_signups
WHERE signup_date IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY signup_hour
ORDER BY signup_hour

SELECT
  payment_method,
  count(*) AS count
FROM stripe_payment_methods
WHERE left(start_time, 4) = {{year}}
GROUP BY payment_method
ORDER BY count(*) DESC;

stages.native:
SELECT
  m."Payment" AS "Payment",
  m."Status" AS "Status",
  count(*) AS "count"
FROM raw_members AS m
JOIN membership_packages AS p ON m."Membership" = p.name
WHERE p.category = 'Pavilion Key'
  AND p.season = {{year}}
GROUP BY m."Payment", m."Status"
ORDER BY m."Payment", m."Status";

stages.native:
SELECT
  pay.product,
  pay.type,
  SUM(pay.amount) AS amount,
  SUM(pay.fees) AS fees
FROM payments AS pay
JOIN membership_packages AS p ON pay.product = p.name
WHERE p.season = {{year}}
  AND p.category NOT IN ('Pavilion Key', 'Social')
GROUP BY pay.product, pay.type
ORDER BY pay.product, pay.type;
